title: Strongheld
description: Limits the Max amount of Strongholds in World to three. Requires Yung's Better Strongholds to work.
body:
Strongheld

Thanks for 3000 Downloads!!!

## Strongheld is a Mod that limits the maximum number of Strongholds in the world to three. Inspired by [CSMP](https://modrinth.com/user/ContentSMP) (Content SMP), which has a similar Stronghold world generation. **REQUIRES BOTH [YUNG'S API](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-api) AND [YUNG'S BETTER STRONGHOLDS](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-strongholds)**. ## Also check out my [Modrinth Profile](https://modrinth.com/user/CalinXD)!
